title: SRPT Stock Earnings - Sarepta Therapeutics Beats EPS, Beats Revenue for Q1 2024
text:
Sarepta Therapeutics reported strong Q1 2024 earnings results, beating analyst expectations on both earnings per share and revenue. The company delivered earnings per share (EPS) of $0.44, significantly exceeding the analyst estimate of $0.02. Revenue came in at $413.46 million, beating the estimate of $373.28 million by 10.77%.

Net Product Revenue Details: Net product revenue reached approximately $360 million, representing 55% growth year-over-year. ELEVIDYS contributed $133.9 million. PMO franchise contributed $225.5 million.

Product Performance: ELEVIDYS sales have plateaued as anticipated while awaiting label expansion approval. Over $334 million in cumulative sales since June 2023 approval. PMO franchise remained relatively stable despite gene therapy competition, demonstrating resilience of the legacy RNA-based therapy platform.

Regulatory Progress: The company was in a quiet period regarding the ELEVIDYS BLA supplement, which seeks to remove age and ambulation restrictions. Management stated that the draft ELEVIDYS label would be received very shortly, with an official action date of June 21.

R&D and Pipeline: EMERGENE trial (SRP-9003 for LGMD2E) enrollment began. Real-world evidence was published showing eteplirsen users survived 5.4 years longer than untreated patients. SRP-5051 peptide-conjugated PMO showed strong dystrophin production results in early development.

Financial Position: Company maintained approximately $1.4 billion in cash and investments, providing resources to support potential label expansion and ongoing clinical development. Strong balance sheet positioned company for continued growth investment.
